mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pinova.admin_account WHERE lower(username) = lower(#{username}) AND deleted = false LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE pinova.admin_account SET failed_login_count = failed_login_count + 1, locked_until = CASE WHEN failed_login_count + 1 >= #{maxAttempts} THEN #{lockedUntil} ELSE locked_until END, version = version + 1, updated_at = #{now}, updated_by = id WHERE id = #{accountId} AND deleted = false

UPDATE pinova.admin_account SET failed_login_count = 0, locked_until = NULL, last_login_at = #{now}, last_login_ip = #{clientIp}, version = version + 1, updated_at = #{now}, updated_by = id WHERE id = #{accountId} AND status = 1 AND deleted = false

UPDATE pinova.admin_account SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, must_change_password = false, password_changed_at = #{now}, failed_login_count = 0, locked_until = NULL, version = version + 1, updated_at = #{now}, updated_by = id WHERE id = #{accountId} AND version = #{version} AND status = 1 AND deleted = false
